attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 STPTH.THIDTE,
 STPTH.THMCID,
 STPTH.THACBR,
 STPTH.THINV,
 STPTH.THNPAS,
 STPTH.THSEQN,
 STPTH.THBTYP,
 STPTH.THADTE,
 STPTH.THROOM,
 STPTH.THNITE,
 STPTH.THNIRM,
 STPTH.THRTYP,
 STPTH.THRATE,
 STPTH.THHCDE,
 STPTH.THNAME,
 STPTH.THADDR,
 STPTH.THCITY,
 STPTH.THSTAT,
 STPTH.THZIP,
 STPTH.THPHNE,
 STPTH.THCCDE,
 STPTH.THREAS,
 STPTH.THCCUR,
 STPTH.THOAMT,
 STPTH.THCFRM,
 STPTH.THOCUR,
 STPTH.THCRTE,
 STPTH.THHCOM,
 STPTH.THCANC,
 STPTH.THRTEM,
 STPTH.THPNR,
 STPTH.THDDTE,
 STPTH.THHCTY,
 STPTH.THTRNR,
 STPTH.THMPAS,
 STPTH.THHCDI,
 STPTH.THEXRT,
 STPTH.THSABR,
 STPTH.THAPOL,
 STPTH.THAMAD,
 STPTH.THGALI,
 STPTH.THFIL1,
 STPTH.THFIL2,
 STPTH.FK_TRAVEL1,
 STPTH.XPK_ROW1
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL   STPTH
attributes.Pre SQL:
COLLECT STATS ON $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL;

DELETE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL A 
	  WHERE   
	   EXISTS (SELECT '1'
	  			    FROM   $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL B
					WHERE  
						   B.THIDTE = A.THIDTE
					AND	   B.THMCID = A.THMCID
					AND	   B.THACBR = A.THACBR
					AND	   B.THINV	= A.THINV
					AND	   B.THNPAS	= A.THNPAS
					AND	   B.THSEQN	= A.THSEQN
					) ;
